blocks.body: Web Storage lets you save key-value data in the browser. **localStorage** persists forever (until cleared). **sessionStorage** is cleared when the tab closes. Both store strings only -- use `JSON.stringify` and `JSON.parse` for objects.

Never store sensitive data (passwords, tokens, personal info) in localStorage. It is accessible to any JavaScript on the page, including third-party scripts and XSS attacks. Use HTTP-only cookies for authentication tokens.
